description: Central registry of Splunkbase app metadata and deployment-role placement for this repo. Used by the cloud installer, batch scripts, tests, and generated deployment docs as the single source of truth for package identity and role support.

deployment_role_descriptions.search-tier: Search heads or search-head clusters that host app UI, REST handlers, dashboards, macros, and search-time knowledge objects.
deployment_role_descriptions.indexer: Indexing tier where index-time parsing or indexer-side knowledge objects belong.
deployment_role_descriptions.heavy-forwarder: Customer-managed full Splunk Enterprise instance used for data collection, parsing, or forwarding.
deployment_role_descriptions.universal-forwarder: Lightweight forwarder tier used where the package or workflow is explicitly forwarder-safe.
deployment_role_descriptions.external-collector: Non-Splunk runtime such as SC4S, SC4SNMP, containers, or Kubernetes workloads that send data into Splunk.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-catalyst-ta-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-catalyst-enhanced-netflow-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Manual install on HF/UF you control
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No app-local config; validate the NetFlow/IPFIX receiver path on the same target
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Optional forwarder-side mappings for extra Enterprise Networking NetFlow dashboards.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-appdynamics-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Configure the AppDynamics controller account and data inputs after install.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-security-cloud-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via CiscoSecurityCloud custom admin handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Multi-product Cisco Security integration app with product-specific setup flows for each packaged integration.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-secure-access-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via `org_accounts`, `update_settings`, and related app APIs
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. The local package is the Secure Access app (`cisco-cloud-security`), not the separate add-on listing. Covers org onboarding plus dashboard settings/bootstrap.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-meraki-ta-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Dashboard macro alignment after install.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-intersight-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Index creation uses ACS.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-dc-networking-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Index creation uses ACS.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-enterprise-networking-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST for macros/saved searches/datamodel settings
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Visualization app only; installer auto-adds required TA `7538` when missing. Optional Enhanced Netflow add-on `6872` should be offered separately when users want extra NetFlow dashboards.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-product-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Delegates to the routed Cisco app install path for the resolved product
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Delegates to the routed Cisco setup skill after resolving the SCAN catalog product name
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Top-level Cisco product orchestrator. Uses the packaged SCAN catalog plus local overrides to resolve a product name, classify gaps, and run the matching setup workflow.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-thousandeyes-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST for OAuth account, HEC-based streaming inputs, polling inputs
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Requires HEC token. OAuth device code flow for auth. ITSI integration optional.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-itsi-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No post-install REST config needed
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Premium product; requires ITSI license. Enables ThousandEyes ITSI integration.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-ai-assistant-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: App-local settings and activation happen in the app UI
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Search-tier app only. Splunk Cloud installs stay on the public Splunkbase path; Enterprise uses cloud-connected activation after install.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-mcp-server-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS private app upload or vetted local package
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST for mcp.conf settings, token policy, and rate limits; local JSON policy overlays remain package-content concerns
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Search-tier MCP endpoint for Splunk with encrypted token issuance and shared Cursor/Codex bridge rendering.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-stream-setup` search-tier app
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS or Splunk Cloud support workflow
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Stream UI / REST on search tier
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cloud deployment is hybrid, not single-target.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-stream-setup` wire-data add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS or bundled with Stream deployment
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No special post-install config in normal flow
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Knowledge-object support for Stream search content.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-stream-setup` forwarder add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Manual install on HF/UF you control
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Local HF files plus host forwarding config
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: This package runs on the heavy/universal forwarder, not the Cloud search tier.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-connect-for-syslog-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; SC4S runtime is rendered for customer-managed hosts or Kubernetes
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: ACS for indexes/HEC where available, search-tier REST for validation, rendered host/Helm assets for runtime
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: External syslog-ng collector pattern. Modeled as a workflow row rather than a Splunk app package.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-connect-for-snmp-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; SC4SNMP runtime is rendered for customer-managed Docker Compose or Kubernetes
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: ACS for indexes/HEC where available, search-tier REST for validation, rendered compose/Helm assets for runtime
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: External SNMP collector pattern. Modeled as a workflow row rather than a Splunk app package.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-enterprise-host-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud install path; bootstraps customer-managed Enterprise hosts only
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Local or SSH-driven Linux host bootstrap for search-tier, indexer, and heavy-forwarder roles
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Enterprise runtime bootstrap workflow for standalone or single-site clustered hosts.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-spaces-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via UCC custom stream/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Firehose streaming input for Cisco Spaces indoor location analytics.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-scan-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS private app upload (no Splunkbase listing)
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No post-install REST config needed; catalog sync runs via scheduled search
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: No Splunkbase listing. Install from local package or private app upload. Product catalog and ecosystem intelligence app for the Cisco-Splunk portfolio.

skill_topologies.notes: API-driven collector app; run on the search tier or a heavy forwarder you control.
Forwarder-side field-mapping add-on for NetFlow or IPFIX receiver paths.
Collector and dashboard setup skill; use on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Product-specific Cisco Security collector app; compatible with the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Secure Access onboarding and dashboard setup app; place on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Collector app for ACI, Nexus Dashboard, and Nexus 9K data; use on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Search-time visualization app with macros, saved searches, and KV Store content.
API collector app; run on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Meraki collector app with dashboard alignment; place on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Product-name router that resolves a Cisco product from the SCAN catalog and delegates to the matching setup skill or explicit gap classification.
Hybrid-capable app that combines HEC push with polling and dashboard setup.
Generic package delivery skill; actual package compatibility comes from the package or app metadata.
External collector workflow that prepares Splunk-side objects and renders SC4S runtime assets.
External collector workflow that prepares Splunk-side objects and renders SC4SNMP runtime assets.
Linux host bootstrap workflow for self-managed Splunk Enterprise search tiers, indexers, cluster managers, SHC members, and heavy forwarders.
Premium search-tier app for ITSI dashboards and service analytics.
Search-tier AI assistant app with cloud-backed inference, app UI settings, and KV Store-backed local chat state.
Search-tier MCP service app with custom REST handlers, KV Store-backed tool metadata, encrypted token issuance, and optional local policy overlays.
Split-package Stream deployment: search-tier UI, forwarder-side capture, and optional indexer knowledge objects.
Cisco Spaces firehose collector app with UCC REST handlers for stream configuration and activation token encryption.
Search-head-only catalog and management app. No data ingestion — provides product catalog UI, ecosystem intelligence, and Splunkbase analytics.

apps.label: Cisco DC Networking App for Splunk
Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
Cisco Catalyst Enhanced Netflow Add-on for Splunk
Cisco Secure Access App for Splunk
Splunk Add-on for Stream Wire Data
